arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s next star? Everything you need to know about striker Gonzalo García
arts.sum: Just when it looked as if the contest was going to extra time, youngster Gonzalo, who came on for Endrick with only eight minutes left to play, headed in Brahim Díaz’s right-wing cross with one of the last touches of the game three minutes into injury time. In the absences of Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham, a new name was the hero for Real Madrid as they left it late to defeat Leganés in the quarterfinals of the Copa del Rey: Gonzalo García.

arts.ttl: Leganes 2-3 Real Madrid: Player ratings as Los Blancos scrape into Copa del Rey semi-finals
arts.sum: Player ratings from the Copa del Rey quarter-final tie between Leganes and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid beats Leganes 3-2 to reach Copa semifinals on García's goal in stoppage time
arts.sum: Gonzalo García scored in stoppage time as Real Madrid avoided an upset by defeating Leganes 3-2 to reach the semifinals of the Copa del Rey on Wednesday. Madrid had taken a two-goal lead at halftime with Luka Modric and Endrick before the hosts rallied to even the match in the second half.

arts.ttl: Leganes 2-3 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as youngster nets first Los Blancos goal to decide last-eight contest
arts.sum: Gonzalo Garcia's first Real Madrid goal sends Carlo Ancelotti's side into the semi-finals of the Copa del Rey on Wednesday evening.
Leganés 2-3 Real Madrid (Modrić, Endrick & García). It was Leganés who had the first pop at goal, with Andriy Lunin being forced into a great save after two minutes of play.
